steps.title: Count eliminated players
steps.content: In each round, half of the remaining players lose and are eliminated. Starting with $240$ players, the eliminated counts are $120$, $60$, $30$, and $15$ for rounds $1$ through $4$.

steps.title: Write the exponential model
steps.content:
The count is multiplied by $\frac{1}{2}$ each round. With round number $r$, the model is
$$p=240(\frac{1}{2})^r$$
The answer is C.
